speaker: MATT
raw_text: All right everyone, roll initiative. (group groans)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And just as you pull back the mandibles, time to crunch down upon you. And that is going to be a 27 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You take 14 points of slashing damage, as the mandibles slice down, clamping onto your shoulder. You manage to pull free, but in doing so, you wrench the pointed portions of the mandible across your shoulder, pulling open the flesh in this horrible jagged pattern.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That brings us to the other one, who is attacking Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Grog! You're right there in front of it. The biggest and most viable visual it can find.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: ♫ No motherfucker, miss ♫ I start singing using my Cutting Words reaction. To try to distract him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, so go ahead and roll your d8 to reduce his attack roll.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. That would have been a 20 to hit. That brings it to a 17.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, as you begin singing out, as it pulls back with--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: --its mandibles to strike at Grog, it (clicks) looks off to you for a second, goes back, at which point Grog has put his axe up to its face and is holding it at bay. As its mandibles are tied in with its blades, and the handle of the axe is trying to hold it back. It strikes at you with its two claws, Grog. That is going to be a 27.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then from the one claw that gets you, you take six points of slashing damage.
